title: Health Signal Schema Model
description: Health Signal Schema defining the structure of component health signals for monitoring readiness.

fields.name: component_name
fields.purpose: Name of the component emitting the signal

fields.name: signal_status
fields.purpose: Health status: healthy | degraded | critical | unknown

fields.name: last_heartbeat
fields.purpose: ISO 8601 timestamp of last signal received

fields.name: signal_metadata
fields.purpose: Optional metadata payload from the component

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No runtime execution.
